## Amazon Taps Bond Market; AI Capex Funding Thesis and Stock Valuation Debated

Hyperscaler bond issuance, if directed at AI infrastructure, confirms continued capex commitment and is constructive for the AI infrastructure supply chain; the valuation question reminds that credit cost of capital is rising alongside investment.

- Amazon issued new bonds (amount not specified in headline).
- The bond issuance is framed as a potential signal of ongoing AI infrastructure capex funding.
- Coverage pairs the credit event with a stock-valuation question — no conclusion on cheapness stated.
- Cross-asset read: bond issuance by a hyperscaler is a credit market event with read-through for AI capex cycle.
